name: [PD-708] Deleting any HDD disk out of 10 or all of them
fullName: [PD-708] Deleting any HDD disk out of 10 or all of them

steps.name: assert expected **{ Object (success, data, ...) }** to have property **data**
assert expected **{ Object (accessToken, expiresAt) }** to have property **accessToken**
assert expected **<h2.font-sub-heading.mb-0>** to have text **Виртуальные серверы**
assert expected **[ <tr>, 1 more... ]** not to contain text **HDD**
